title: Divan-i Shams: Out Beyond Ideas
description: The most famous lyric in Sufi literature: beyond rightdoing and wrongdoing, there is a field.
introduction: The most famous lyric in Sufi literature: beyond rightdoing and wrongdoing, there is a field.

translation.text: Out beyond ideas of wrongdoing and rightdoing, there is a field. I will meet you there.
